name: Herbed Vegetable Yogurt Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen chopped spinach, thawed and dried
1 roasted red bell pepper, peeled, seeded, and chopped
8 ounces water chestnuts, drained and sliced
1 tablespoon Tabasco sauce or Pickapeppa hot sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together all ingredients and season to taste with salt and pepper.
2. Refrigerate at least 4 hours before serving.
3. Serve with fresh, crisp vegetables, crackers, or toasted pita chips.
4. Makes 4 cups.
Yogurt cheese
To make approximately 3 cups, use 3 containers of yogurt (16 ounces each). Rinse and squeeze dry a large piece of cheesecloth. Double it and use to line a strainer. Spoon in yogurt, fold over any excess cloth to cover, and set over a bowl to drain overnight in the refrigerator. Scrape cheese into a covered container. Final yield will depend on how much liquid was in the yogurt.
